g.title: Viewport background, three panel frames, header + footer bands
g.text: KIOSK-004 · selection → recenter + sidebar-replacement detail · 2026-05-19 · single-design v1a · rev 2 (three-layer basemap)
Lab fixture 800x480 × 3 stacked panels · ADR-015-pending; substrate open per README.md:36
Panel A — tag detail (tag-3 selected, no-fix)
Panel B — relay detail (relay-2 selected, overdue)
Panel C — gateway detail (gw-0 selected, healthy)
Palette: tools/sarcom-kiosk-lab/src/ui/palette.rs · TEXT_BRIGHT #c0ccd8 · TEXT_DIM #6c7f92 · AMBER #eab308 · GREEN #40d080 · BLUE #32b4ff · RED #ff3c3c · ORANGE #f0a030 · GREY #6b7280
Three-layer map per pmtiles_map.rs:82-125 (basemap + LIDAR hillshade @ 0.5 + OSM overlays) · sidebar IS detail surface · KIOSK-004:24, 28, 76, 92 · ADR-007:38-46 · SPIKE-001 closed strict

g.title: Panel A map area 480x426 at x=20..500, y=90..516. Three layers per pmtiles_map.rs:82-125. tag-3 ghost at last_valid_fix_pos with dashed ring.
Markers folded into #map (Panel A) for adjacency.
Panel A sidebar-replacement detail for tag-3 (no-fix). NO overlay; this REPLACES the row list. Back-to-list row is the only dismissal affordance.
g.text: kiosk-lab data model does not carry
no overlay · no slide-in · no tap-outside

g.title: Panel A map chrome: compass rose + scale bar only. No floating buttons. No crosshair.
Panel A + B + C annotations. Layer L1/L2/L3 anchors call out the three-layer basemap composition per pmtiles_map.rs:82-125.

two rows (lat/lon) to the last VALID fix.

does not carry these · stated explicitly
